_human_review.notes: US Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Issuer: Aurora Vitality Health, Inc. (Delaware) proposes to acquire CaringPath Analytics LLC (Oregon) via cash-and-stock merger; anticipated sign date Q3 FY2026, subject to definitive documentation.

Aggregate consideration: $240,000,000 ($120,000,000 cash; $120,000,000 in common stock priced at VWAP over 30 trading days on a U.S. national securities exchange); no registered offering contemplated.
Financing: committed term loan from Riverton Bay Bank, N.A. and a concurrent private placement to accredited investors under Rule 506(b); no general solicitation or roadshow.
Employee matters: no layoffs at signing; union engagement to follow NLRA protocols; existing religious-observance scheduling at CaringPath’s Lakeford, OR facility will be honored post-closing.
Analyst communications: sell-side analysts may be wall-crossed under NDA; any guidance updates or material synergy estimates will be disclosed broadly via Form 8-K and webcast to comply with Reg FD.

Closing conditions: HSR filing/clearance, no MAE, transfer of healthcare licenses and payer contracts, bank vendor risk approvals, and completion of IT security review (including SOC 2 and HIPAA risk assessment); fairness opinion from Seabrook Advisory LLC.

Policies/ethics: parties reaffirm DEI commitments and equal opportunity regardless of race, religion, sexual orientation, or disability; Open Door Ethics Policy and Civic Participation Guidelines remain in force and will be harmonized at closing.
biometric palm-scan templates for facility access (biometric)
membership in Allied Caregivers Union Local 872 (union)
a self-identified bisexual orientation disclosed for HR accommodations (sexual-orientation)
existing religious-observance scheduling at CaringPath’s Lakeford, OR facility will be honored post-closing
proposes to acquire CaringPath Analytics LLC (Oregon) via cash-and-stock merger
circulation is limited to wall-crossed recipients and their counsel
sell-side analysts may be wall-crossed under NDA
no onward sharing to portfolio managers or trading desks until public dissemination
any guidance updates or material synergy estimates will be disclosed broadly via Form 8-K and webcast to comply with Reg FD

Aggregate consideration: $240,000,000 ($120,000,000 cash; $120,000,000 in common stock priced at VWAP over 30 trading days on a U.S. national securities exchange); no registered offering contemplated.

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun/heading, not a person or MNPI

uncertain.reason: Negated MAE reference; materiality concept is present but rule excludes labeling negated MAC/MAE.
Embargo/timing signal without the exact tokens 'Signing Date'/'Closing Date'; may be out of scope for strict detectors.
